title: build(deps): bump github.com/containers/storage from 1.45.3 to 1.45.4
body:
Bumps [github.com/containers/storage](https://github.com/containers/storage) from 1.45.3 to 1.45.4.
Release notes

Sourced from github.com/containers/storage's releases.

v1.45.4

What's Changed

  • Bump to v1.45.2 by @​rhatdan in containers/storage#1476
  • build(deps): bump github.com/klauspost/compress from 1.15.14 to 1.15.15 by @​dependabot in containers/storage#1478
  • build(deps): bump github.com/containerd/stargz-snapshotter/estargz from 0.13.0 to 0.14.0 by @​dependabot in containers/storage#1479
  • imageStore: add a GarbageCollect() method by @​nalind in containers/storage#1484
  • build(deps): bump github.com/containerd/stargz-snapshotter/estargz from 0.14.0 to 0.14.1 by @​dependabot in containers/storage#1486
  • Test btrfs in CI by @​nalind in containers/storage#1485
  • idmap: new package by @​giuseppe in containers/storage#1487
  • test helper: maxArgs = 0 is actually a meaningful value by @​nalind in containers/storage#1482
  • Makefile: remove vestiges of VMs, update $(sources) by @​nalind in containers/storage#1481
  • pkg/idmap: add boilerplate for unsupported by @​giuseppe in containers/storage#1489
  • [CI:DOCS] Configure Renovate by @​renovate in containers/storage#1490
  • Cirrus: Update CI VM Images to F37 by @​giuseppe in containers/storage#1491
  • fix(deps): update module github.com/microsoft/go-winio to v0.6.0 by @​renovate in containers/storage#1495
  • CI: check that cross-compilation works by @​nalind in containers/storage#1499
  • Test zfs in CI by @​nalind in containers/storage#1500
  • Migrate from github.com/tchap/go-patricia to github.com/tchap/go-patricia/v2 by @​nalind in containers/storage#1501
  • build(deps): bump golang.org/x/sys from 0.4.0 to 0.5.0 by @​dependabot in containers/storage#1502
  • Run codespell on codebase by @​rhatdan in containers/storage#1508
  • Stop using golang.org/x/net/context by @​mtrmac in containers/storage#1509
  • build(deps): bump github.com/opencontainers/selinux from 1.10.2 to 1.11.0 by @​dependabot in containers/storage#1507
  • options: reject empty runroot or graphroot by @​giuseppe in containers/storage#1510
  • overlay: allow unknown backing fs with mountProgram by @​giuseppe in containers/storage#1512
  • Don't hard code SELinux labels into code by @​rhatdan in containers/storage#1514
  • build(deps): bump github.com/Microsoft/hcsshim from 0.9.6 to 0.9.7 by @​dependabot in containers/storage#1516

New Contributors

  • @​renovate made their first contribution in containers/storage#1490

Full Changelog: https://github.com/containers/storage/compare/v1.45.2...v1.45.4

Commits
  • 283b47b Bump to v1.45.4
  • 202c645 Merge pull request #1516 from containers/dependabot/go_modules/github.com/Mic...
  • eb56a36 Merge branch 'main' into dependabot/go_modules/github.com/Microsoft/hcsshim-0...
  • 01edf7e Merge pull request #1514 from rhatdan/selinux
  • f6c5bd6 build(deps): bump github.com/Microsoft/hcsshim from 0.9.6 to 0.9.7
  • 01b671b Don't hard code SELinux labels into code
  • 0697414 Merge pull request #1512 from giuseppe/mount-program-disable-check
  • b9f1697 overlay: allow unknown backing fs with mountProgram
  • cfffdac Merge pull request #1510 from giuseppe/error-out-invalid-dirs
  • 9ebdbd9 options: reject empty runroot or graphroot
  • Additional commits viewable in compare view

[![Dependabot compatibility score](https://dependabot-badges.githubapp.com/badges/compatibility_score?dependency-name=github.com/containers/storage&package-manager=go_modules&previous-version=1.45.3&new-version=1.45.4)](https://docs.github.com/en/github/managing-security-vulnerabilities/about-dependabot-security-updates#about-compatibility-scores) Dependabot will resolve any conflicts with this PR as long as you don't alter it yourself. You can also trigger a rebase manually by commenting `@dependabot rebase`. [//]: # (dependabot-automerge-start) [//]: # (dependabot-automerge-end) ---
Dependabot commands and options
You can trigger Dependabot actions by commenting on this PR: - `@dependabot rebase` will rebase this PR - `@dependabot recreate` will recreate this PR, overwriting any edits that have been made to it - `@dependabot merge` will merge this PR after your CI passes on it - `@dependabot squash and merge` will squash and merge this PR after your CI passes on it - `@dependabot cancel merge` will cancel a previously requested merge and block automerging - `@dependabot reopen` will reopen this PR if it is closed - `@dependabot close` will close this PR and stop Dependabot recreating it. You can achieve the same result by closing it manually - `@dependabot ignore this major version` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this major version (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot ignore this minor version` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this minor version (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot ignore this dependency` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this dependency (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself)
